definition: structural collectives = concept communities (Phase-3 meta-communities, Phase-8 principles)
emergence: FAILS TO EMERGE — group/social semantics cannot be extracted structurally
finding: the closest Quran-internal 'collectives' are structural concept communities (42 meta-communities, 16 principle modules) — but these are structural clusters, not a model of how groups form / succeed / fail. A societal model does NOT emerge structurally.
